        *   Q3a = 410.73 J

        *   Q3 = 501.4 J
        *   Qid = 32.96 J

*   CAD [ATDC] values in Figure 17 as indicated at the axis

* Heat release energies: Q1=429.5 J, Q2 = 787.1 J, Q3a = 410.73 J; Q3b=90.67 J, Q3 = 501.4 J and Qid=32.96 J (Figure 17)
